case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CALVIN ELAM BAIL BONDS
FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CALVIN ELAM BAIL BONDS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CALVIN ELAM BAIL BONDS
